RecordThing.Description: Sometimes you need finer control over power, without running a bajillion cables in every room. The Load Center can control power to various classes of devices on your cable networks, and has Logic control for advanced use cases.

If you need more room to connect components, or want a double-sided switchboard, the Wireway is your tool. It's solely used for connecting extra breakers and bus ties together. It also makes a good plinth for a Breaker.

If you need more room to connect components, or want a double-sided switchboard, the Wireway is your tool. It's solely used for connecting extra breakers and bus ties together. It also makes a good plinth for a Breaker.

Stationeers have many times tried ways to connect data networks without bridging power, avoiding short-circuits and cable burns. The Optoisolator is the result of these efforts - Using a tiny parasitic draw to transfer data signals between up to four networks, bidirectionally. Due to signalling-strength limitations, one optoisolator cannot proxy devices through a second optoisolator.
A variant of the {THING:StructureDataBridge}, the Data Diode allows the output network to see all data devices on the input network, but not vice-versa.
A {THING:LoadCenter} construction kit
A {THING:CircuitBreakerHeavy} construction kit, that can also be used to place bus ties and wireways

A Circuit Breaker can protect a network from over-current, tripping to protect the cabling. Breakers do not trip instantly - remember to leave headroom for your cables. You can set the trip limit during construction with a {THING:ItemScrewdriver}

A Circuit Breaker can protect a network from over-current, tripping to protect the cabling. Breakers do not trip instantly - remember to leave headroom for your cables. You can set the trip limit during construction with a {THING:ItemScrewdriver}

A Smart Breaker is an advanced {THING:SmallCircuitBreaker} with an in-built {THING:StructureCableAnalysizer}. Additionally, it can trip immediately when in an over-current situation. The data network information can be accessed from both power connections. You can set the trip limit during construction with a {THING:ItemScrewdriver}

A Smart Breaker is an advanced {THING:SmallCircuitBreaker} with an in-built {THING:StructureCableAnalysizer}. Additionally, it can trip immediately when in an over-current situation. The data network information can be accessed from both power connections. You can set the trip limit during construction with a {THING:ItemScrewdriver}
A {THING:SmallCircuitBreaker} construction kit
A {THING:SmartCircuitBreaker} construction kit
Connects a set of {THING:CircuitBreakerHeavy}s to a power network. You need at least two of these.
Connects a {THING:CircuitBreakerHeavy} to a data network.
A construction kit for various flavours of Cable Tray, which can be used to carry multiple cabling runs in parallel in a single grid without connecting them together
A straight piece of Cable Tray. When placed as part of a larger cable tray run, connected cables with a matching capacity and colour will be tied together

A straight piece of Cable Tray. When placed as part of a larger cable tray run, connected cables with a matching capacity and colour will be tied together These longer pieces will ONLY merge cables on their ends, and not in the middle of the tray

A straight piece of Cable Tray. When placed as part of a larger cable tray run, connected cables with a matching capacity and colour will be tied together These longer pieces will ONLY merge cables on their ends, and not in the middle of the tray

A straight piece of Cable Tray. When placed as part of a larger cable tray run, connected cables with a matching capacity and colour will be tied together These longer pieces will ONLY merge cables on their ends, and not in the middle of the tray
A curved piece of Cable Tray. When placed as part of a larger cable tray run, connected cables with a matching capacity and colour will be tied together
A curved piece of Cable Tray. When placed as part of a larger cable tray run, connected cables with a matching capacity and colour will be tied together
A curved piece of Cable Tray. When placed as part of a larger cable tray run, connected cables with a matching capacity and colour will be tied together
A Cable Tray junction box, connecting up to 6 directions. When placed as part of a larger cable tray run, connected cables with a matching capacity and colour will be tied together

Record.Value: Turn breaker off to clear trip
